persona.name: Priya Sharma
persona.voice: Cautious, hopeful, practical. Worried about scams — has heard horror stories about ghost consultants. Wants proof of legitimacy before trusting anyone with her case. Compares to her experience finding services in India.

narrator.voice: Third-person. Frame around consumer trust, directory conversion, and the marketplace flywheel between consultants and immigrants.
narrator.format: what the user needs to convert + trust gap or signal identified
